race.description: Golden Shores Hervey Bay Maiden Hcp
race.comment: SPIRIT OF ALL (2) is a three-year-old gelding by Spirit Of Boom out of Cassandara Shadow set to debut for the Harry Richardson stable. Proved too good in a Toowoomba Inner Track trial recently. Should be primed for a strong showing and it will pay to keep an eye on betting. HE IS THE KISS (11) ran a strong third over 1550m at Murwillumbah two runs back then was below his best last time over 1650m when fifth, beaten 9 lengths. Better suited at this shorter trip so looks a leading contender. CLAW MACHINE (10) finished eighth two runs back then improved last start but just found one better over 1200m at this track, beaten 0.9 lengths after being in the firing line on the turn. Nicely placed to feature in the finish. LUCKY ARTIE (7) returned last time and finished fourth at Gold Coast over 1000m, beaten 5.5 lengths. Definite top-three hope with plenty of improvement to come.
